baseline.observed: A successful GLM JSON response with revised_prompt set to whitespace could return an empty AI recommendation with used_ai=true.

red_test.result: FAILED before implementation because glm_improvement_from_content did not exist and empty revised_prompt was not a distinct parser contract.

change.summary: Extracted GLM content parsing into glm_improvement_from_content and reject JSON content with missing or empty revised_prompt so improve_prompt_inner falls back locally.

verification.result: PASS: Vite build, 28 library tests, 13 CLI tests, and strict clippy passed.

safety_controls: No live GLM call was required for the parser regression test.
Non-JSON GLM text remains preserved when non-empty.
Invalid empty JSON recommendations now use the existing local fallback path.
